subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-12-21 in London
subcodes.first_line: Last night, we discussed the subjects of love and brotherhood. Love is of several kinds. One of these is the love a person feels for his immediate family
subcodes.first_line_orig: دیشب از محبت و اخوت صحبت می‌نمودیم محبت بر چند قسم است یک قسم محبت عائله ای است
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @call to unity; prohibition of disunity, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @The Holy Spirit
